# Documentation Skill

> **Role:** Act as a Senior AI/ML Engineer and Technical Writer.
>
> **Objective:** Your task is to generate a professional `README.md` file for my project. You must strictly base the technical depth and the vision of the project on the attached "pre-documentation" draft, while expanding upon it with expert-level details.
>
> **Guidelines:**
> 1. **Voice & Tone:** Write in the exact same voice, style, and tone as the provided draft, ensuring continuity in the project's vision and goals.
> 2. **Technical Depth:** Analyze the code in the current directory and use it to add detailed technical explanations for every component.
> 3. **Structure:** The generated `README.md` must include:
>    - **Title & Badges:** Include appropriate tech stack badges (e.g., Python, etc.) using `shields.io` format.
>    - **Description:** An expanded version of the draft that clearly defines the purpose and the "why" behind the project.
>    - **Tech Stack:** A structured list of technologies used.
>    - **Requirements:** Automatically extract and list the necessary environment dependencies from the code.
>    - **Architecture:** Provide a clear, technical overview of how the system works.
>    - **Installation:** Step-by-step instructions for setup.
>    - **Demo:** Add a placeholder section (e.g., `## Demo`) with an empty space or instructions on where to add media.
>    - **Roadmap:** Elaborate on the vision mentioned in my draft, formatting it as a clear task list for future development.
>    - **Contribution:** Standard guidelines for how others can contribute.
>
> **Task:**
> Read the project files in this workspace and the attached pre-documentation. Combine them to create a high-quality, production-ready `README.md` that reflects my professional goals.
